import csv

def parse_csv_header(filepath):
    f = open(filepath, "r")
    reader = csv.reader(f)
    header = next(reader)
    return header

def read_config(path):
    fh = open(path, "r")
    content = fh.read()
    return content.splitlines()

def write_report(data, path):
    f = open(path, "w")
    for row in data:
        f.write(",".join(str(v) for v in row) + "\n")
